title: ta`a` #8591
definition:
1) to deceive, misuse
    1a) (Pilpel)
        1a1) to be a mocker, mock
        1a2) mocker (subst)
    1b) (Hithpalpel)
        1b1) to ridicule
        1b2) mocking (participle)
